final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-fantasy
Asset type: digital illustration, wide landscape
Primary request: dreamy fairy-tale underwater world with a mermaid swimming among coral reefs, glowing jellyfish, sunken ship treasure, and light rays piercing down from the ocean surface
Scene/backdrop: deep underwater seabed, coral reef ecosystem, sunken wooden shipwreck with scattered gold coins and treasure chests, soft sandy floor
Subject: graceful mermaid with flowing hair and iridescent tail gliding between colorful coral formations; clusters of bioluminescent jellyfish drifting nearby; treasure spilling from a moss-covered sunken ship
Style/medium: fairy-tale fantasy digital illustration, painterly, dreamlike
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, slightly low angle looking upward toward the light source, layered depth with foreground coral, midground mermaid, background ship and light rays
Lighting/mood: god rays of golden-blue light filtering down from the ocean surface, bioluminescent glow from jellyfish, magical and ethereal atmosphere
Color palette: deep ocean blues and teals, warm golden treasure accents, soft pink and purple coral, glowing aqua and violet jellyfish light, iridescent mermaid tail
Materials/textures: translucent jellyfish membranes, shimmering fish scales, barnacle-encrusted wood of the shipwreck, soft coral polyps, sparkling gold coins
Constraints: maintain dreamlike fantasy tone throughout; light rays must be visible from above the frame
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, dark horror atmosphere, cluttered illegible composition, watermark
